title: BND Mine Wingores
description:
This mod adds a Wingores staff
The mod is handwritten, but you can use it in your builds.
body:
This mod adds a Wingores - A staff of magic that allows you to fire a magic spell in the form of a rune, new item - Winga (rune), and new achievement!
The mod is handwritten, and created for BND Mine Origins modpack.
But you can use it in your builds.
